# CLI Anything Hub

CLI Anything Hub is a hosted remote MCP for CLI tool MCP.

Website: https://clianythingharness.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: CLI tool MCP
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://clianythingharness.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://clianythingharness.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.clianythingharness/clianythingharness-mcp
Tools: cli_tool_list, cli_command_run, cli_schema_validate, cli_result_receipt

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
